note: Scoping entry, no perf numbers. Answers questions/IVF.md: IVF-the-router is out of scope and not built here; IVF is the PREMISE that justifies the engine (without it, a query scans all N -> the ~100ms brute-force number from 001; IVF narrows to ~sqrt(N) cells x nprobe so the within-cell exact scan is viable). Our scan is the kernel that runs nprobe times per query. In-scope seam questions logged (not resolved): (1) cell sizing sets scan length N; (2) residual encoding - does rotation+binary funnel gain recall on residuals vs raw; (3) per-cell top-C and cross-cell merge width. questions/IVF.md removed.
